sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67122" key="mete/rasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετέρ-ᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67122.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">transfusion</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἵματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
